name: read_mem
short_description: Read one or more data files (.mem .mif .dat).
full_help:
read_mem

Description: 
Read one or more data files (.mem .mif .dat).

Syntax: 
read_mem  [-quiet] [-verbose] <files>...

Returns: 
list of file objects that were added

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <files>     Data (.mem .coe .dat) file name(s)

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
